A1.description: Two people are in a kitchen. The woman is cutting vegetables. The man is cooking on the stove.

A2.description: Two people are in a kitchen. The woman is cutting vegetables. The man is cooking on the stove.

B1.description: This picture shows a man and a woman preparing dinner together. The woman is chopping red and yellow peppers on a cutting board, while the man is busy stirring food in a pot on the gas stove.

B2.description: The image captures a casual, happy moment of a couple cooking a meal in their well-lit kitchen. The woman is focused on slicing fresh vegetables with a sharp knife, and the man beside her is actively stirring the contents of a pot simmering on the stove, perhaps making a sauce. They appear to be enjoying the process and each other's company.
